nodes.name: Webhook - New Hire Intake
nodes.notes: TRIGGER: Receives new hire form submission or HRIS webhook. Accepts POST request with new hire JSON data.

nodes.name: Validate Intake Record
nodes.notes: Checks all required fields are present. Calculates validation score.

nodes.name: Route: Valid or Needs Review?
nodes.notes: TRUE path = valid record, proceed to AI extraction. FALSE path = send to HR review queue.

nodes.name: Slack - HR Review Alert
nodes.notes: Sends Slack alert to HR team when validation fails. Workflow stops here for flagged records.

values.content: You are an onboarding operations assistant for an enterprise HR team. Extract structured data from employee intake records and return ONLY valid JSON. No commentary. No markdown. No explanation.

=Extract onboarding fields from this intake record.

Employee intake data:
{{ JSON.stringify($json, null, 2) }}

Return valid JSON with exactly these fields:
- full_name (string)
- personal_email (string)
- company_email (string or null)
- job_title (string)
- department (string)
- office_location (string or null)
- manager_name (string)
- manager_email (string or null)
- employment_type (full-time | part-time | contractor)
- start_date (ISO 8601 format)
- required_systems (array of strings)
- missing_documents (array of strings, empty array if none)
- review_flags (array of issue descriptions, empty array if none)

Rules: Set null for any field you cannot determine. Never guess or infer. Flag any data conflicts in review_flags.

nodes.name: AI - Extract and Normalize Fields
nodes.notes: GPT-4o extracts and normalizes all onboarding fields. Returns structured JSON.

nodes.name: Enrich Profile with Role Data
nodes.notes: Merges AI-extracted data with department-specific onboarding track (tools, training, priorities).

nodes.name: Airtable - Create Onboarding Record
nodes.notes: Stores the confirmed onboarding profile in Airtable as the central source of truth.

values.content: You are an onboarding experience designer. Create personalized, practical onboarding plans. Return ONLY valid JSON.

nodes.name: AI - Generate Onboarding Plan
nodes.notes: GPT-4o generates a role-specific personalized onboarding plan.

values.content: You are an HR assistant. Write concise, professional manager briefing notes in plain text with section headers. Keep under 250 words.

nodes.name: AI - Draft Manager Briefing
nodes.notes: Generates a concise briefing note for the hiring manager.

parameters.subject: =Your New Team Member: {{ $('Enrich Profile with Role Data').first().json.full_name }} starts {{ $('Enrich Profile with Role Data').first().json.start_date }}
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $('Enrich Profile with Role Data').first().json.manager_name }},

Your new team member is confirmed and their onboarding is underway. Please see the briefing below.

---

{{ $input.first().json.choices[0].message.content }}

---

Onboarding Record ID: {{ $('Enrich Profile with Role Data').first().json.record_id }}

If you have any questions, please contact the HR team.

Best regards,
HR Onboarding Team

nodes.name: Gmail - Send Manager Briefing
nodes.notes: Sends AI-generated briefing note to the hiring manager via Gmail.

parameters.subject: =Welcome to the team, {{ $('Enrich Profile with Role Data').first().json.full_name }}! Here's everything you need for Day 1

nodes.name: Gmail - Send Welcome Email
nodes.notes: Sends personalized welcome email with onboarding plan to new hire.

nodes.name: Slack - IT Provisioning Alert
nodes.notes: Notifies IT team in Slack with all provisioning requirements for the new hire.

nodes.name: Airtable - Update Status to Complete
nodes.notes: Updates the onboarding record status after all communications are sent.

meta.description: AI-powered onboarding automation workflow. Triggers on new hire intake, validates and extracts data via GPT-4o, enriches profile, creates Airtable record, generates personalized onboarding plan, and sends communications to new hire, manager, and IT team.
